title: solanum triflorum var. pyrethrifolium
intro: Solanum triflorum var. pyrethrifolium is a lesser-known variety of the Solanum triflorum plant, also known as the three-flowered bittersweet nightshade or wild eggplant, which belongs to the Solanaceae family. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Solanum triflorum var. pyrethrifolium include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of conditions, including fever, colds, and skin irritations.
